Feature request

**Summary**
A short, descriptive summary of the requested feature.

**User story**
As a <type of user>, I want <capability> so that <reason>.

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

**Testing Expectations**

State the expected automated coverage up front. Use `docs/planning/repository-testing-strategy.md` to pick the right test layers.

- Unit tests:
- Integration tests:
- Browser E2E:
- Deferred coverage follow-up: <!-- concrete follow-up issue number if any layer is deferred; remove if none -->

**Why is this important?**
Explain the user value and any metrics or success criteria.

**Mockups / Notes / Links**
Include screenshots, links to designs, or related issues.
